name: MicroTaskX
description: A modular micro-RTOS for Arduino with priority scheduling, task args, microsecond precision, WDT, ISR queuing, cooperative coroutines, inter-task signals and mutexes, real-time CPU profiling, smart sleep, PID with anti-windup, Kalman filter, software PWM, rotary encoder, EMA/moving-average smoothing, battery estimation, CRC8, LCD smart refresh, typewriter effect, and circular queue.
keywords: multitasking, scheduler, task-manager, cpu-profiling, non-blocking, timing, fast-adc, ema-filter, micro-rtos, modular, low-power, smart-sleep, pid-control, kalman-filter, software-pwm, rotary-encoder, watchdog, isr-queuing, coroutines, mutexes, signals, crc8, battery-monitor, lcd-optimization, circular-queue
